title: RoleInvocation
description: Envelope-composed Role subprocess input artifact. This formalizes DGOS-A-0002's Role Invocation Convention with protocol snake_case fields under the shared artifact envelope.
$comment: DGOS-A-0002 requires a one-shot subprocess input envelope carrying invocation identity, role identity, operation, decision scope, source/input artifacts with hashes, context bundles, policy refs, budget/model policy, timeout, allowed Engines/tools, expected outputs, and trace destination. Cross-primitive envelope fields are inherited through allOf and are not redefined.

invocation_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable correlation id for this one-shot Role invocation and its matching RoleResult.

role_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable Role identity being invoked.

role_version.description: REQUIRED string. Version of the role prompt, profile, and artifact contract.

operation.description: REQUIRED string. Machine-readable operation requested from the Role.

input_artifacts.description: REQUIRED array. Source artifact references supplied to the Role, including content hashes where available.

context_bundle_refs.description: REQUIRED array. ContextBundle artifact references bounding the Role's context window.

policy_decision_refs.description: REQUIRED array. Policy, DecisionRecord, or other decision references that constrain this invocation. Empty means no prior policy decision was provided.

timeout_ms.description: REQUIRED integer. Caller-enforced timeout in milliseconds.

allowed_engines.description: REQUIRED array. Deterministic Engines the Role runner may call. Empty means no Engines are allowed.

allowed_tools.description: REQUIRED array. Tools the Role runner may call behind the subprocess boundary. Empty means no tools are allowed.

expected_output_artifacts.description: REQUIRED array. Output artifact schemas the caller expects the Role to produce or reference.

roleDecisionScope.title: RoleDecisionScope
roleDecisionScope.description: REQUIRED object. Machine-readable scope that bounds what the Role is allowed to decide.

scope_type.description: REQUIRED string. Scope category such as task, initiative, artifact, patch, review, or decision.

scope_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable id of the scoped work, artifact, or decision.

objective.description: REQUIRED string. Bounded outcome requested from the Role.

constraints.description: OPTIONAL array. Machine-readable constraints or policy codes for this invocation.

decision_refs.description: OPTIONAL array. Prior decisions that shape this scope.

roleInvocationBudget.title: RoleInvocationBudget
roleInvocationBudget.description: REQUIRED object. Machine-readable spend and token budget for the Role runner.

max_cost_usd.description: OPTIONAL number. Maximum allowed estimated or actual cost in USD.

max_input_tokens.description: OPTIONAL integer. Maximum input tokens available to the Role.

max_output_tokens.description: OPTIONAL integer. Maximum output tokens available to the Role.

modelTierPolicy.title: ModelTierPolicy
modelTierPolicy.description: REQUIRED object. Machine-readable policy for model/provider tier selection.

allowed_tiers.description: REQUIRED array. Model tiers the Role runner may use.

preferred_tier.description: OPTIONAL string. Preferred model tier when several allowed tiers are available.

fallback_allowed.description: REQUIRED boolean. Whether the runner may choose a non-preferred allowed tier.

engine_version.description: OPTIONAL string. Required Engine version or version range.

operations.description: OPTIONAL array. Engine operations allowed for this invocation.

tool_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable tool identity as understood by the Role runner.

permission.description: REQUIRED string. Permission level granted for this invocation.

artifact_type.description: REQUIRED string. Expected output artifact catalog type.

schema_version.description: REQUIRED string. Expected payload schema version.

required.description: REQUIRED boolean. Whether absence of this output blocks the invocation result.

relation.description: OPTIONAL string. Expected relationship to the invocation.

roleTraceRequest.title: RoleTraceRequest
roleTraceRequest.description: REQUIRED object. Durable trace destination for invocation logs and related records.

trace_id.description: OPTIONAL string. Stable trace id when allocated by the caller.

jsonObject.title: RoleInvocationJsonObject
jsonObject.description: Structured JSON object; consumers must not parse prose from it.
